title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin proposes routing different frontend development phases to different models: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and code generation. He argues this composition approach leverages the relative strengths of each model while reducing costs compared to using Opus exclusively.
